articles.author: Alessio Palumbo
articles.title: Epic Games Tips Unreal Engine 6 Timeline With Rocket League Reveal, Targeting UE5’s Multithreading Wall - Wccftech
articles.description: Epic Games hints at Unreal Engine 6 through Rocket League. Tim Sweeney's earlier comments point to a multithreaded future for the engine.
articles.content: During the Rocket League Championship Series 2026 in Paris, developer Psyonix and parent company Epic Games revealed that the popular free-to-play vehicular soccer game will be the first game to use … [+2090 chars]
